title: Smoky Cornstarch Stir-fry
description: A lazy-sunday Thai dish featuring cornstarch, designed to be Mediterranean-friendly with a smoky flavor for a crispy texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix cornstarch with 1/4 cup of water to create a slurry.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and onion, sauté until softened.
Add tomato paste and stir for about 2 minutes until fragrant and slightly thickened.
Pour in soy sauce and lime juice; stir well to combine.
Add cornstarch slurry gradually into the mixture while continuously stirring to avoid lumps. Cook for another minute.
Stir in chopped basil leaves, ensuring they wilt nicely without overcooking.
Serve immediately as a side dish or as part of your main meal.
